name: case01_basic_07_pipe_header_footer_utf8_job
description: Case 01 Variant 07: Pipe-delimited, header, footer, UTF-8, LF line endings. Reads case01_basic_20260408_07_HF_UTF8_LINUX.txt, casts types, filters footer, adds VERSION_DATE/ETL_UPDATE_DATE, writes gzip CSV to staging.
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Escaper":"\\\\","Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 CSV Source - 07_HF_UTF8_LINUX (pipe, header, footer)","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case01_basic/case01_basic_20260408_07_HF_UTF8_LINUX.txt"],"QuoteChar":"quote","Recurse":false,"Separator":"pipe","WithHeader":true}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SparkSQL - Cast, Filter Footer, Transform","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"ID","Type":"bigint"},{"Name":"PREFIX","Type":"string"},{"Name":"FNAME","Type":"string"},{"Name":"LNAME","Type":"string"},{"Name":"AGE","Type":"smallint"},{"Name":"BALANCE","Type":"decimal(18,2)"},{"Name":"VERSION_DATE","Type":"date"},{"Name":"ETL_UPDATE_DATE","Type":"timestamp"}]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(ID), '') AS BIGINT) AS ID, NULLIF(TRIM(PREFIX), '') AS PREFIX, NULLIF(TRIM(FNAME), '') AS FNAME, NULLIF(TRIM(LNAME), '') AS LNAME, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(AGE), '') AS SMALLINT) AS AGE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(BALANCE), '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS BALANCE, TO_DATE('20260408', 'yyyyMMdd') AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource WHERE UPPER(TRIM(ID)) != 'TOTAL' AND ID IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ID) != ''"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case01_basic/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
